Miss: Half 伤害, and the target is not weakened. This attack does not provoke opportunity attacks. </p>]]

Miss: Half 伤害, and the target is not weakened. This attack does not provoke opportunity attacks. </p>]]

自由动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">⚔ <b>重伤 Breath</b> (free, when first bloodied, encounter) ✦ <b>Necrotic</b></p><p>The bloodwind’s breath weapon recharges, and the bloodwind uses it immediately.</p>]] ⚔ 重伤 Breath (free, when first bloodied, encounter) ✦ Necrotic

The bloodwind’s breath weapon recharges, and the bloodwind uses it immediately.

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;"> <b>Breath Leap</b> (free, when the bloodwind uses its breath weapon; recharges when first bloodied) ✦ <b>Teleportation</b></p><p>The bloodwind can teleport to any unoccupied space adjacent to one of the targets of its breath weapon, whether or not the attack hits.</p>]] 吐息跳跃 Breath Breath Leap (free, when the bloodwind uses its breath weapon; recharges when first bloodied) ✦ Teleportation

自由动作

触发： 当血风使用其吐息武器时

血风可以传送到其吐息武器的一个目标相邻的任意未被占据空间，无论攻击是否命中。

触发动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">➶ <b>Repelling Gaze</b> (immediate reaction, when an enemy attacks the bloodwind, recharges when first bloodied) ✦ <b>Charm</b></p><p>The bloodwind fixes the target with its gaze; ranged 10; targets the triggering enemy; +26 vs Will; the target is dazed and is pushed 2 squares at the start of its turn (save ends both). This attack does not provoke opportunity attacks. </p>]] ➶ 斥退凝视 Repelling Repelling Gaze (immediate reaction, when an enemy attacks the bloodwind, recharges when first bloodied) ✦ Charm

即时反应

触发： 当一名敌人攻击血风时；首次陷入重伤时充能

血风以凝视锁定目标；远程10；目标为触发攻击的敌人；+26 vs 意志；目标陷入晕眩，并在其回合开始时被推离2格（豁免终止两者）。此攻击不会引发借机攻击。

-

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Combat Advantage</b></p><p>If the bloodwind’s bite attack hits a target it has combat advantage against, the target also takes ongoing 20 伤害 and is weakened (save ends both).</p>]] 战斗优势 Combat Combat Advantage

如果血风的啃咬攻击命中一个它具有战斗优势的目标，目标还会受到20点持续伤害并陷入虚弱（豁免终止两者）。 [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Scent of Blood</b></p><p>The bloodwind automatically gains combat advantage against bloodied living creatures.</p>]]

移动动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;"> <b>Shadowy Discorporation</b> (move; recharge ⚃⚄⚅) ✦ <b>Illusion</b></p><p>The bloodwind teleports 10 squares and becomes invisible until the end of its next turn.</p>]] 暗影解体 Shadowy Shadowy Discorporation (move; recharge ⚃⚄⚅) ✦ Illusion

移动动作

血风传送10格，并隐形直到其下一回合结束。

（AI 翻译，未经人工校对）
